abilities.shortEffect: Raises Speed and lowers Defense by one stage each upon being hit by a physical move.
abilities.effect:
Whenever a physical move hits this Pokémon, its Speed rises one stage and its Defense falls one stage.

This ability triggers on every hit of a multiple-hit move.

abilities.shortEffect: When hit by a move that makes direct contact, the Pokémon and the attacker will faint after three turns unless they switch out of battle.
abilities.effect: When the Pokémon with Perish Body is hit with a contact move, both the attacker and the Pokémon with Perish Body will faint in three turns.
